.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to a version compatible with modern tooling and JDK 11+ build environments.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern npm packages and may fail to run scripts required for the build process on current systems.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build system with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is deprecated and incompatible with the new Angular-based frontend structure; the build will fail without the new tooling.

package.json.general_idea: Remove legacy Grunt dependencies and plugins.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is no longer used in the project; keeping these dependencies causes bloat and potential conflicts.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend architecture.
package.json.why_exists: The application has migrated to Angular; these packages are required for the application to compile and run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Angular CLI is required to build and serve the Angular application.
The project has switched from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for unit testing; tests will fail without these dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Add ESLint and Prettier for code linting and formatting.
package.json.why_exists: Code quality checks are now enforced via ESLint/Prettier; missing these may cause CI failures if checks are enabled.

package.json.general_idea: Add Webpack and related plugins for module bundling.
package.json.why_exists: Webpack is the core bundler for the new Angular build process.

package.json.general_idea: Add Protractor and WebDriver Manager for end-to-end testing.
package.json.why_exists: E2E tests require Protractor and WebDriver to run against the application.

package.json.general_idea: Add Docker Compose scripts for database and service management.
package.json.why_exists: Development and CI workflows rely on Docker for database setup; scripts are needed to manage containers.

package.json.general_idea: Add Maven-based backend build and test scripts.
package.json.why_exists: The backend build process is now integrated into npm scripts for CI/CD consistency.

package.json.general_idea: Update project metadata (name, version, description, license).
package.json.why_exists: Reflects the specific application identity and legal requirements.

package.json.general_idea: Add configuration variables for backend port, environment, and packaging.
package.json.why_exists: Scripts rely on these config values to determine runtime behavior.

package.json.general_idea: Add cache directory configuration for npm.
package.json.why_exists: Optimizes npm install performance by specifying cache locations.
Integrates test results with SonarQube for code quality analysis.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to use annotationProcessorPaths for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA metamodel generation, replacing the legacy maven-processor-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The maven-processor-plugin is deprecated and incompatible with modern annotation processing standards; without this change, MapStruct and JPA metamodel generation will fail or produce incorrect source paths in JDK 11+ environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin dependencies to use liquibase-hibernate5 instead of liquibase-hibernate4.
pom.xml.why_exists: liquibase-hibernate4 is incompatible with Hibernate 5/6 used in Spring Boot 2.x/JDK 11; without this change, Liquibase diff generation fails with classpath errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JIB Maven plugin configuration for containerizing the application with an AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architectural testing with JUnit 5.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standardized error responses.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry dependency for metrics export.
Add Dropwizard Metrics Core dependency.
Remove Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies (cloudfoundry, spring-service, localconfig) as they are deprecated.
Remove Spark Metrics Reporter dependency.
Remove explicit version tags from Spring Security dependencies to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Add maven-checkstyle-plugin configuration for code style enforcement.
Add maven-javadoc-plugin configuration.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin for integration testing.
Add maven-idea-plugin configuration.
Add maven-resources-plugin configuration with filtering for YAML files.
Add git-commit-id-plugin for generating git properties.
Add properties-maven-plugin for reading sonar-project.properties.
Update JaCoCo plugin configuration to separate unit and integration test coverage reports.
Update maven-war-plugin configuration to exclude web.xml and set static resources directory.
Add frontend-maven-plugin configuration.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to enforce Java version range [1.8,16) and Maven version.
Remove maven-sortpom-plugin as it is no longer required.
Remove gatling-maven-plugin configuration.
Remove maven-eclipse-plugin configuration from plugins section (moved to pluginManagement or removed).
Remove maven-surefire-plugin configuration from plugins section (moved to pluginManagement or removed).
Remove maven-war-plugin configuration from plugins section (moved to pluginManagement).
Remove sonar-maven-plugin from plugins section (moved to pluginManagement).
Remove liquibase-maven-plugin configuration from plugins section (moved to pluginManagement).
Remove spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration from plugins section (moved to pluginManagement).
Remove maven-dependency-plugin and maven-enforcer-plugin lifecycle mapping configuration for Eclipse m2e.
Remove explicit resource filtering configuration from build section (moved to maven-resources-plugin).
Add defaultGoal spring-boot:run to build section.
Add spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf dependency.
Add spring-boot-starter-web dependency.
Add spring-boot-starter-test dependency with JUnit Vintage exclusion.
Add spring-boot-test dependency.
Add spring-security-test dependency.
Add spring-boot-starter-websocket dependency.
Add spring-security-data dependency.
Add spring-security-messaging dependency.
Update maven-clean-plugin filesets to match new static resource directory structure.
Replace yeoman-maven-plugin with frontend-maven-plugin for frontend build management.
Switch embedded server from Tomcat to Undertow in production profile.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin build-info execution for Actuator info endpoint.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate git information for the application.
Add war profile to support building WAR files.
Add IDE profile with MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator dependencies.
Add eclipse profile with m2e lifecycle mapping configuration.
Add e2e profile for end-to-end testing configuration.
Add no-liquibase profile to disable Liquibase migrations.
Add api-docs profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add tls profile for TLS configuration.
Add webpack profile with frontend-maven-plugin configuration for development.
Update dev profile to include H2 database and devtools dependencies.
Add maven-surefire-plugin configuration with runOrder and excludes.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin configuration for integration tests.
Add sonar-maven-plugin to plugin management.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration with repackage goal and mainClass.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Update H2 database alias and JDBC URL to reflect the specific application name instead of a generic placeholder.
Enable remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions, and Spring Boot 2.x (required for JDK 11) defaults to HikariCP; using the old class causes runtime initialization failures or classpath errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to support newer MySQL versions and JDBC drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or initialization error at startup.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove deprecated Hibernate naming strategy configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; referencing it causes a ClassNotFoundException at startup.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Ehcache region factory with standard JCache provider.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or cache initialization failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL parameters required by newer MySQL drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer MySQL Connector/J versions (8.0+) require explicit serverTimezone and useSSL settings; omitting them causes runtime exceptions or connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Spring Boot 1.x format to Spring Boot 2.x Micrometer format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'metrics' property namespace was removed in Spring Boot 2.0; using it results in unrecognized configuration properties warnings or failures if strict binding is enabled.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate Liquibase configuration from Spring Boot 1.x format to Spring Boot 2.x format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'liquibase' root property was moved under 'spring.liquibase' in Spring Boot 2.0; using the old format results in unrecognized configuration properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate Spring profiles configuration from Spring Boot 1.x format to Spring Boot 2.x format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'spring.profiles.active' property structure changed in Spring Boot 2.0; using the old nested format may result in unrecognized configuration properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add JHipster-specific configuration properties for production profile.
Add server compression configuration for production profile.
Add graceful shutdown configuration for production profile.
Add logging level configuration for production profile.
Add mail configuration for production profile.
Add Thymeleaf cache configuration for production profile.
Add devtools disable configuration for production profile.

Add JPA configuration for production profile.
Add security remember-me key configuration for production profile.
Add logstash configuration for production profile.
Add cache configuration for production profile.
Add mail base-url configuration for production profile.
Add JSON logging format configuration for production profile.
Add HTTP cache configuration for production profile.
Add application-specific properties section for production profile.
Add documentation comments for TLS configuration in production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after: # To enable TLS in production, generate a certificate using:

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add documentation comments for JHipster properties in production profile.
Add documentation comments for Spring Boot properties in production profile.
Add documentation comments for profile configuration in production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after: # Spring Boot configuration for the "prod" profile.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x management endpoint configuration to Spring Boot 2.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties in favor of the new `management.endpoints` and `management.endpoint` hierarchy; using old properties results in ignored configuration or startup warnings/errors.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized
      roles: 'ROLE_ADMIN'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x standardizes async configuration under `spring.task.execution`; while custom properties might still bind if a custom `@ConfigurationProperties` class exists, the migration aligns with the framework's standard auto-configuration to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 2.x defaults.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-websocket-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x expects mail configuration under `spring.mail`; relying on custom `mail:` root properties requires custom binding which may be removed or deprecated in the migration target.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Springfox/SpringDoc properties compatible with Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The old `swagger:` root properties are specific to JHipster 4/5 custom configuration classes; JHipster 6+ uses standard Springfox properties under `jhipster.api-docs` or similar, requiring the structure change to bind correctly.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterWebsocketSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterWebsocketSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot 2.x JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes default behaviors for JPA/Hibernate (e.g., `open-in-view` defaults to false, new generator mappings); explicit configuration is required to maintain expected behavior or adopt new best practices.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true
      hibernate.connection.provider_disables_autocommit: true
      hibernate.cache.use_second_level_cache: true
      hibernate.cache.use_query_cache: false
      hibernate.generate_statistics: false
      hibernate.jdbc.batch_size: 25
      hibernate.order_inserts: true
      hibernate.order_updates: true
      hibernate.query.fail_on_pagination_over_collection_fetch: true
      hibernate.query.in_clause_parameter_padding: true
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: none
      naming:
        physical-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringPhysicalNamingStrategy
        implicit-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringImplicitNamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x metrics and health probe configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x introduces new health probe endpoints (liveness/readiness) and Micrometer-based metrics configuration; these are not present in Spring Boot 1.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  health:
    group:
      liveness:
        include: livenessState
      readiness:
        include: readinessState,datasource
    probes:
      enabled: true
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 60
    enable:
      http: true
      jvm: true
      logback: true
      process: true
      system: true
    distribution:
      percentiles-histogram:
        all: true
      percentiles:
        all: 0, 0.5, 0.75, 0.95, 0.99, 1.0
    tags:
      application: ${spring.application.name}
    web:
      server:
        request:
          autotime:
            enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x server servlet session cookie configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moves session cookie configuration under `server.servlet.session.cookie`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x application name and profile configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x standardizes application name under `spring.application.name` and profile activation under `spring.profiles.active`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  application:
    name: jhipsterWebsocketSampleApplication
  profiles:
    active: #spring.profiles.active#

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add JHipster specific client application properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6+ requires specific client app properties under `jhipster.clientApp` for frontend integration.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x info endpoint configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x configures info endpoint properties under `info:` and `management.info:`.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Thymeleaf and message source configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x configures Thymeleaf under `spring.thymeleaf` and messages under `spring.messages`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  messages:
    basename: i18n/messages
  thymeleaf:
    mode: HTML

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x scheduling task configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    scheduling:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-websocket-sample-application-scheduling-
      pool:
        size: 2

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x JMX and bean overriding configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x configures JMX under `spring.jmx` and bean overriding under `spring.main.allow-bean-definition-overriding`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jmx:
    enabled: false
  main:
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x output ANSI configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x configures ANSI output under `spring.output.ansi`.
